description_long: This is a modern, oval-shaped wooden cabinet with a rich, dark brown wood grain finish. The front features two sliding doors with a lighter, almost white wood paneling and slim vertical handles, flanking three open central shelves. The sides are smoothly curved, giving the piece a distinctive, contemporary look. The cabinet stands on four short, tapered legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, suitable for urban interiors such as lofts, apartments, or stylish offices. The craftsmanship and material choice suggest durability and a focus on both aesthetics and functionality.
description: A modern oval wooden cabinet with sliding light-panel doors and open central shelves, standing on short tapered legs. The design is sleek, with a dark wood finish and minimalist features.
description_view_0: The top view shows the smooth, oval-shaped dark wood surface with visible wood grain and no visible openings or handles.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the curved profile of the cabinet, emphasizing its thickness and the continuous wood finish.
description_view_2: The front view displays two light-colored sliding doors with vertical handles and three open shelves in the center.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the curved wood surface without any openings or features.
